mdSummary:
# Kbd

Keyboard shortcut glyph — renders <kbd> with styling.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/kbd

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Kbd | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Kbd | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` |  |
| Kbd | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Kbd | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Kbd) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Kbd />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Kbd/Kbd.razor`
